author: Ho & Ermon (2016)
title: Generative Adversarial Imitation Learning
why: Imitasi gaya GAN—tiru ahli tanpa reward, gerbang masuk inverse RL

author: Fujimoto & Gu (2021)
title: A Minimalist Approach to Offline Reinforcement Learning
why: Offline RL paling simpel: TD3 + satu term BC, tetap juara

author: Fujimoto et al. (2018)
title: Off-Policy Deep Reinforcement Learning without Exploration
why: Offline RL perdana lawan extrapolation error, fondasi semua

author: Kostrikov et al. (2021)
title: Offline Reinforcement Learning with Implicit Q-Learning
why: Belajar offline tanpa query aksi luar dataset, expectile regression

author: Kumar et al. (2020)
title: Conservative Q-Learning for Offline Reinforcement Learning
why: Q-value konservatif biar ga overestimate aksi OOD, baseline wajib

author: Chen et al. (2021)
title: Decision Transformer: Reinforcement Learning via Sequence Modeling
why: RL jadi sequence modeling—prediksi aksi via return-to-go, elegan

author: Janner et al. (2021)
title: Offline Reinforcement Learning as One Big Sequence Modeling Problem
why: Transformer model seluruh trajektori + beam search buat planning

author: Bacon et al. (2017)
title: The Option-Critic Architecture
why: Belajar opsi (aksi temporal) end-to-end tanpa subgoal manual

author: Vezhnevets et al. (2017)
title: FeUdal Networks for Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning
why: Hierarki manager-worker, manager kasih goal di ruang laten

author: Nachum et al. (2018)
title: Data-Efficient Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning
why: HRL off-policy hemat sampel, koreksi goal buat robot nyata

author: Duan et al. (2016)
title: RL^2: Fast Reinforcement Learning via Slow Reinforcement Learning
why: Meta-RL: algoritma disimpen di bobot RNN, adaptasi kilat

author: Finn et al. (2017)
title: Model-Agnostic Meta-Learning for Fast Adaptation of Deep Networks
why: Meta-learning inisialisasi biar adaptasi task baru beberapa step

author: Sunehag et al. (2017)
title: Value-Decomposition Networks For Cooperative Multi-Agent Learning
why: MARL: pecah value tim jadi per-agen, atasi lazy agent

author: Rashid et al. (2018)
title: QMIX: Monotonic Value Function Factorisation for Deep Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
why: VDN naik level—mixing non-linear monoton, koordinasi lebih kaya

author: Lowe et al. (2017)
title: Multi-Agent Actor-Critic for Mixed Cooperative-Competitive Environments
why: Actor-critic multi-agen, kritik tahu aksi semua agen (CTDE)

author: Yu et al. (2021)
title: The Surprising Effectiveness of PPO in Cooperative Multi-Agent Games
why: PPO ternyata jago di MARL kooperatif, minim tuning

author: Ha & Schmidhuber (2018)
title: World Models
why: Bikin model mimpi dunia (VAE+RNN), latih agen di dalam imajinasi

author: Hafner et al. (2018)
title: Learning Latent Dynamics for Planning from Pixels
why: Planning dari piksel via model dinamika laten, tanpa policy

author: Hafner et al. (2019)
title: Dream to Control: Learning Behaviors by Latent Imagination
why: Latih actor-critic murni di imajinasi model laten, efisien

author: Hafner et al. (2023)
title: Mastering Diverse Domains through World Models
why: Satu config kuasai 150+ task, pertama dapat diamond Minecraft

author: Silver et al. (2016)
title: Mastering the game of Go with deep neural networks and tree search
why: Kalahkan juara Go pakai policy/value net + MCTS, bersejarah

author: Silver et al. (2017)
title: Mastering the game of Go without human knowledge
why: Tanpa data manusia, self-play murni lampaui AlphaGo

author: Silver et al. (2017)
title: Mastering Chess and Shogi by Self-Play with a General Reinforcement Learning Algorithm
why: Satu algoritma kuasai catur, shogi, Go dari nol via self-play

author: Schrittwieser et al. (2019)
title: Mastering Atari, Go, Chess and Shogi by Planning with a Learned Model
why: Planning tanpa tahu aturan—pelajari model sendiri, kuasai Atari+board

author: Ye et al. (2021)
title: Mastering Atari Games with Limited Data
why: MuZero super hemat data: super-human Atari cuma 2 jam main

author: Vinyals et al. (2019)
title: Grandmaster level in StarCraft II using multi-agent reinforcement learning
why: Grandmaster StarCraft II, liga multi-agen, real-time raksasa

author: Fawzi et al. (2022)
title: Discovering faster matrix multiplication algorithms with reinforcement learning
why: RL nemu algoritma perkalian matriks baru, pecahkan rekor 50 tahun
